[[/7. Nxc6|7. Nxc6 - only move]]|=}}White ties the minor piece count at 3 with [[Chess Opening Theory/1. e4/1...e5/2. Nf3/2...Nc6/3. Bb5/3...f5/4. Nc3/4...fxe4/5. Nxe4/5...d5/6. Nxe5/6...dxe4/7. Nxc6|'''7. Nxc6''']]. It's a free knight because if Black recaptures with the b-pawn, Bxc6+ followed by Qh5+ gives Black big problems.{{wikipedia|Ruy_Lopez#Schliemann_Defence:_3...f5}}{{Chess Opening Theory/Footer}}
title: Chess Opening Theory/1. e4/1...e5/2. Nf3/2...Nc6/3. Bb5/3...f5/4. Nc3/4...fxe4/5. Nxe4/5...d5/6. Nxe5/6...dxe4
